subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards God, the Lord of all worlds, wherein We recount that which hath befallen Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی الله مولی العالمین نذکر له ما ورد علینا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
